name: Tee off Golf Lounge
address: 100 W Higgins Rd Z, South Barrington, IL 60010
about: Tee Off Golf Lounge is a premier indoor golf simulator venue offering a technologically advanced experience. The facility utilizes high-end hardware including an innovative motion plate and weight shift analysis sensors to provide realistic and comprehensive data tracking. Their simulators are powered by Unreal Engine 5.3x for hyper-realistic course visuals and are accompanied by advanced practice tools for detailed performance analysis. The venue offers a variety of membership plans, daily rates, and is available for both public leagues and private event bookings, positioning itself as a suitable location for both casual play and serious practice in a comfortable, food-service oriented environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Innovative five-segment motion plate with tri-layer mapping for realistic shot variety
Advanced weight shift analysis sensors to improve swing mechanics and stability
Hyper-realistic graphics powered by Unreal Engine 5.3x for an immersive experience
Comprehensive practice tools providing detailed ball speed, apex data, and lie angles
Full-service bar and food options available for a complete social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Quality food options are available with an online menu to explore.
Full-service bar available; described as perfect for networking and team building events.

simulator_hardware.notes: Five segment motion plate with tri-layer mapping for shot variety.
Advanced sensors to track and analyze weight distribution during the swing.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The provided information does not specify if club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to confirm their policy on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full-service bar and quality food, but there is no mention of a BYOB policy. It is best to inquire directly about external food and drink options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content states a group of four people played for 3 hours, suggesting a typical round of 18 holes takes approximately 45 minutes to an hour per person, depending on the pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue hosts school visits and youth organizations with special rates, indicating a level of kid-friendliness, though it is primarily marketed towards adults and corporate events.
